normalization.notes: Store Syriac text in NFC and preserve source strings for audit. Keep optional vowel points and dots explicit during analysis rather than compatibility-folding presentation forms. Never ship presentation-form code points as canonical lesson text.

segmentation.pedagogical_units: base consonants, matres lectionis, dot distinctions, optional vowel points, joining behavior, and common word-final forms
segmentation.notes: Syriac is an RTL joining script. Treat contextual glyph forms as rendering variants of one pedagogical letter while preserving combining marks and dot contrasts for reviewer inspection.
